calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Dircting Sheriff To Deliver Real Property And Declaration Of Daschel Butler In Support Of Judgement Vacating Real Property.
Off Calendar Jan-12-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marlene Pappas Getchell for Daschel Butler (Trustee of the Swearington Trust).

Ms. Getchell stated that she had not heard from Mr. Vann or Mr. Thomas, that she had not received any objections, and that the Court should sign the order. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda/R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar May-20-2008 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar May-20-2008 Off Calendar

Petition For Removal Of Trustee And For Order Compelling Accounting
Off Calendar May-20-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court will contact Dennis Vann (Counsel). If the case has settled, the Court will take the matters off calendar.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar May-13-2008 Continued To May-20-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

The matter was continued to May 20, 2008. The Clerk will notify Counsel of the new hearing date.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Aguerre.

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar May-13-2008 Continued To May-20-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Removal Of Trustee And For Order Compelling Accounting
Off Calendar May-13-2008 Continued To May-20-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Mar-11-2008 Continued To May-13-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marlene Getchell for Petitioner/Trustee: Dashel Butler. Dennis Vann for Beneficiary, Aubrey Thomas.

Mr. Vann reported that he is seeking a 45 day continuance for the inspection of the subject property. Ms. Getchell agreed to that request in open court. The Court continued the matter to May 13, 2008, for status on mediation, accounting and instructions on trustee.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Reporter: C. Casey CSR#8098. Bailiff: R. Harris. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/R. Noguera.

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Mar-11-2008 Continued To May-13-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Removal Of Trustee And For Order Compelling Accounting
Off Calendar Mar-11-2008 Continued To May-13-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Jan-16-2008 Continued To Mar-11-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for Aubrey Thomas.

Mr. Vann requested a continuance stating that the property inspection had not taken place. The matter was continued to March 11, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Jan-16-2008 Continued To Mar-11-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Sep-26-2007 Continued To Nov-28-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Marlene Getchell appearing for and with trustee Daschel Butler. Dennis Vann appearing for and with Aubrey Thomas. Mediation did not resolve this matter but they did agree to have a contractor to inspect the house. Ms. Getchell reported that the contractor was no allowed into the house. Both parties will sign a stipulation for inspection of the house and submit an order to court for signature. Matter is continued to 11/28.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Kurt Sandberg.

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Sep-26-2007 Continued To Nov-28-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Jul-25-2007 Continued To Sep-26-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Dennis Vann appearing for Aubrey Thomas. Ms. Getchell is not available today. Matter is not resolved. Parties have agreed to find out the rental value. Ms. Johnson has agreed that they can go back for further mediation. All petitions are continued to 9/26 for status.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: De Leon.

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Jul-25-2007 Continued To Sep-26-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Jun-27-2007 Continued To Jul-25-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance made. Matter is continued to 7/11 for status. Clerk to notify counsel.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Rob Harris.

Clerk called Dennis Vann and he informed the clerk that he was suppose to appear and request for continuance for 30 days to complete mediation. Matter is continued to 7/25. The continuance to 7/11 is vacated.

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Jun-27-2007 Continued To Jul-25-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Jun-27-2007 Continued To Jul-25-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Apr-25-2007 Continued To Jun-27-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Marlene Getchell appearing for successor trustee Daschell Butler. Dennis Vann appearing for and with Aubrey Thomas. Parties are agreed to Pro Bono Mediation. Court is referring this matter to the Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed not later than 6/20. Matter is continued to 6/27 for status.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Off Calendar Mar-19-2007 Continued To Mar-20-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Feb-20-2007 Continued To Mar-20-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Marlene Getchell appearing for trustee Daschel Butler. Dennis Vann appearing for respondent Aubrey Thomas. Mr. Thomas is living in the property and he does not pay rent. He has a 1/4 interest in the property. Mr. Vann argued that Mr. Thomas is a co-owner and he is entitled to an accounting by the trustee. Court agreed that the trustee should file an accounting. One of the co-owner should buyout the other. Mr. Thomas owes 3/4 value of the rent. Status on filing of the accounting by the trustee is set on 3/20. The petition for instructions is continued to 3/20.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Leticia Perez CSR# 7782. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: J. Peralta.

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Feb-05-2007 Continued To Feb-20-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Application For Determination
Off Calendar Dec-11-2006 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Aubrey Thomas appeared in Court. Counsel for the petitioner is not in Court. She has called the Court to accept the tentative ruling. Petition is denied. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Karla Davis, CSR#12998. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Application For Determination
Off Calendar Nov-27-2006 Continued To Dec-11-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
